allow:
Bash(
# Get all .ts/.tsx/.js files, excluding Next.js special files and routes
find /Users/MAC/Desktop/delulu-v0/apps/web/src -type f \\\( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.js" \\\) | grep -vE '\(page\\.tsx|layout\\.tsx|route\\.\(ts|tsx\)|loading\\.tsx|error\\.tsx|not-found\\.tsx|middleware\\.ts|global-error\\.tsx|template\\.tsx|next\\.config|tailwind\\.config|postcss\\.config\)' | sort > /tmp/all_files.txt
wc -l /tmp/all_files.txt
)

Bash(
# Filter out files that match Next.js special naming conventions
# These should not be included in the unused list:
# - opengraph-image.tsx
# - twitter-image.tsx  
# - sitemap.ts
# - robots.ts
# - app.tsx \(next\)
# - document.tsx \(next\)

cat /tmp/unused_files.txt | grep -vE "\(opengraph-image|twitter-image|sitemap|robots|^app\\.tsx|^document\\.tsx|DailyClaimClient\)" > /tmp/unused_files_filtered.txt

wc -l /tmp/unused_files_filtered.txt
)
